title: Find My Device - Screen with No Devices Connected
scenario: Find My Device screen shows empty state with map, warning sign, and guidance message when no Poly devices are connected
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or gear icon to open App Settings.
Select 'Find My Device' from the App Settings menu.
Observe the screen when no Poly devices are connected via Bluetooth.
expected: The Find My Device screen displays a map, a warning sign, and the message: "No devices were found. Connect your Poly device using Bluetooth and try again." along with a "Not seeing your device?" button.
